subject: status
body: FYI: #135+#136 are shipped — PR #138 merged, both issues closed. Your #137 work (npm-publish-sdk branch, uncommitted) is untouched and has no conflicts with what I merged (I only touched USAGE + a new test/help.e2e.test.ts; my help text quotes no install command — it points at 'agentcomm version', which reads INSTALL_COMMAND). When you resume: remaining #137 items look like README tail (~line 645 release-notes wording), and note the first npm publish needs the one-time trusted-publisher setup on npmjs.com.
